import logging
import json

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
tracer = None

def process_event(event):
    payload_json = json.dumps(event["payload"])
    logger.debug(f"Event payload: {payload_json}")
    trace_span = tracer.start_span("process") if tracer else None
    result = handle(event)
    if trace_span:
        trace_span.set_attribute("payload", payload_json)
        trace_span.end()
    return result

def handle(event):
    return {"status": "processed", "id": event["id"]}
